allow: Bash(FLASK_APP=app.py uv run flask db init)
Bash(FLASK_APP=app.py uv run flask db migrate -m "initial schema")
Bash(FLASK_APP=app.py DATABASE_URL="sqlite:////tmp/migrate_test.db" uv run flask db upgrade)
Bash(sqlite3 /tmp/legacy.db "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='alembic_version';")
